ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "river_basin" TEXT /* Name of the river basin */,
  "climate_model" TEXT /* Climate model used for predictions */,
  "population_growth_rate" TEXT /* Population growth rate in the area */,
  "efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Efficiency of water usage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation recorded */,
  "runoff" REAL /* Volume of runoff */,
  "sw_in" REAL /* Surface water inflow */,
  "sw_out" REAL /* Surface water outflow */,
  "sw_diversions" REAL /* Surface water diversions */,
  "sw_returns" REAL /* Surface water returns */,
  "gw_diversions" REAL /* Groundwater diversions */,
  "gw_returns" REAL /* Groundwater returns */,
  "recharge" REAL /* Amount of recharge */,
  "gw_in" REAL /* Groundwater inflow */,
  "sw_to_gw" REAL /* Surface water to groundwater interaction */,
  "gw_out" REAL /* Groundwater outflow */,
  "et_land_surface" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from land surface */,
  "et_sw" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from surface water */,
  "et_human_use" REAL /* Evapotranspiration related to human use */,
  "et_gw" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from groundwater */,
  "et_total" REAL /* Total evapotranspiration */,
  "cumulative_storage_change_human_use" REAL /* Cumulative storage change due to human use */,
  "cumulative_storage_change_gw" REAL /* Cumulative storage change in groundwater */,
  "monthly_storage_change_human_use" REAL /* Monthly storage change due to human use */,
  "monthly_storage_change_gw" REAL /* Monthly storage change in groundwater */,
  "ag_land" TEXT /* Agricultural land usage status */,
  "water_temperature" TEXT /* Water temperature reading */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality rating */,
  "water_level" REAL /* Water level reading */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_data_river_basin FOREIGN KEY ("river_basin") REFERENCES river_basins ("basin_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_data_climate_model FOREIGN KEY ("climate_model") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "river_basins" (
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each river basin */,
  "basin_name" TEXT /* Name of the river basin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the river basin */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the basin is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the river basin */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population served by the river basin */,
  "main_water_sources" TEXT /* Main water sources of the river basin */,
  "main_water_users" TEXT /* Main water users of the river basin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate record */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the river basin */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Population growth rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "forecasted_year" INTEGER /* Forecasted year */,
  "forecasted_growth_rate" REAL /* Forecasted population growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("basin_id") REFERENCES river_basins ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency record */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the river basin */,
  "efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Efficiency rating (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the efficiency metrics */,
  "best_practices" TEXT /* Best practices for water efficiency */,
  "challenges" TEXT /* Challenges in achieving water efficiency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_efficiency_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("basin_id") REFERENCES river_basins ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evapotranspiration" (
  "et_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evapotranspiration record */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the river basin */,
  "et_land_surface" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from land surface */,
  "et_sw" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from surface water */,
  "et_human_use" REAL /* Evapotranspiration related to human use */,
  "et_gw" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from groundwater */,
  "et_total" REAL /* Total evapotranspiration */,
  "et_plants" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from plants */,
  "et_soil" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from soil */,
  "et_water" REAL /* Evapotranspiration from water bodies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("et_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evapotranspiration_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("basin_id") REFERENCES river_basins ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_changes" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage change record */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the river basin */,
  "cumulative_storage_change_human_use" REAL /* Cumulative storage change due to human use */,
  "cumulative_storage_change_gw" REAL /* Cumulative storage change in groundwater */,
  "monthly_storage_change_human_use" REAL /* Monthly storage change due to human use */,
  "monthly_storage_change_gw" REAL /* Monthly storage change in groundwater */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of storage changes */,
  "forecasted_change" REAL /* Forecasted storage change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_changes_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("basin_id") REFERENCES river_basins ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Read permission for the table */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Write permission for the table */,
  "delete_permission" INTEGER /* Delete permission for the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
